sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.38 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: Let$G=F/R$be a pro-$p 0.1ex$-group with one defining relation, where$R$is the normal subgroup of a free pro-$p 0.1ex$-group$F$generated by a single element$r F^p[F,\, F]$. [r]{a)} Suppose that$r=t^p$for some$t F$; can$G$contain a Demushkin group as a subgroup?
